description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets the variable GIT_STRATEGY to clone. Add a test:ava job in the default test stage using the image registry.gitlab.com/zingo-labs/webextension/ava:latest that runs npm test ./test --verbose. Add test:eslintplugin and test:eslintstandard jobs (also in the test stage) using their respective images registry.gitlab.com/zingo-labs/webextension/eslintplugin:latest and registry.gitlab.com/zingo-labs/webextension/eslintstandard:latest, each executing eslint ./src --ext .js. Add a test:htmlhint job in the test stage using the image registry.gitlab.com/zingo-labs/webextension/htmlhint:latest that runs htmlhint.
